mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN road_section_ledger u ON a.tenant_id = u.tenant_id AND a.unit_id IS NOT NULL AND a.unit_id = u.id AND u.deleted = false LEFT JOIN road_section_line ln ON a.tenant_id = ln.tenant_id AND a.section_id IS NOT NULL AND a.section_id = ln.id AND ln.deleted = false LEFT JOIN road_section_km km ON a.tenant_id = km.tenant_id AND a.object_type = 'ROAD_SECTION_KM' AND a.object_id = km.id AND km.deleted = false LEFT JOIN road_section_hm hm ON a.tenant_id = hm.tenant_id AND a.object_type = 'ROAD_SECTION_HM' AND a.object_id = hm.id AND hm.deleted = false

a.id, a.task_id, a.object_type, a.object_id, a.route_id, a.section_id, a.unit_id, a.route_code, a.direction, a.start_stake, a.end_stake, a.year, a.standard_code, a.mqi, a.sci, a.pqi, a.bci, a.tci, a.pci, a.rqi, a.rdi, a.pbi, a.pwi, a.sri, a.pssi, a.grade, a.zero_reason, a.assessed_at, ST_AsGeoJSON(COALESCE(km.geom, hm.geom, u.geom, ln.geom)) AS geom_geo_json, a.created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM assessment_result a
WHERE ORDER BY a.route_code ASC, a.start_stake ASC NULLS LAST, a.year DESC

SELECT FROM assessment_result a
WHERE a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = false

SELECT FROM assessment_result a
WHERE AND COALESCE(km.geom, hm.geom, u.geom, ln.geom) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.route_code ASC, a.start_stake ASC NULLS LAST

SELECT count(1) AS total_count, count(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'EXCELLENT' THEN 1 END) AS excellent_count, count(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'GOOD' THEN 1 END) AS good_count, count(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'MEDIUM' THEN 1 END) AS medium_count, count(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'POOR' THEN 1 END) AS poor_count, count(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'BAD' THEN 1 END) AS bad_count, avg(a.mqi) AS avg_mqi, avg(a.pqi) AS avg_pqi, avg(a.pci) AS avg_pci FROM assessment_result a WHERE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO assessment_result(id, tenant_id, task_id, object_type, object_id, route_id, section_id, unit_id, route_code, direction, start_stake, end_stake, year, standard_code, mqi, sci, pqi, bci, tci, pci, rqi, rdi, pbi, pwi, sri, pssi, grade, zero_reason, assessed_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES
(#{e.id}, #{tenantId}, #{e.taskId}, #{e.objectType}, #{e.objectId}, #{e.routeId}, #{e.sectionId}, #{e.unitId}, #{e.routeCode}, #{e.direction}, #{e.startStake}, #{e.endStake}, #{e.year}, #{e.standardCode}, #{e.mqi}, #{e.sci}, #{e.pqi}, #{e.bci}, #{e.tci}, #{e.pci}, #{e.rqi}, #{e.rdi}, #{e.pbi}, #{e.pwi}, #{e.sri}, #{e.pssi}, #{e.grade}, #{e.zeroReason}, #{e.assessedAt}, #{userId}, #{userId}, #{e.createdAt}, #{e.updatedAt}, false)
